title: The Backrooms
description: The backrooms in Minecraft texture pack
body:
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2e840b310a102c98151cf7f8723736f8588715e.png)

Lvl 0

Wallpaper lvl 0 = smooth sandstone

Wallpaper with long stripe lvl 0 = birch planks

Wallpaper with short stripe lvl 0 = bricks

Carpet lvl 0 = Hay bael

Roof = Diorite

Lvl 0.1

Red = Roof lvl 0.1 = Smooth_granite

Red wallpaper with short stripe lvl 0.1 = Smooth_andesite

Red wallpaper = Sandstone

Red wallpaper with long stripe  = Carved sandstone.

Hearts 

Hardcore hearts 

Icon in game

Buttons 

Background

And more+ 
![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe4601b7e728efdada83617b185937ce914a615e.png)![inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65e59236d4d3b4c5301156da72f493c912f2dc1.png)This Backrooms texture pack for minecraft v1.8.8, 1.8.9 and above contain
